entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The target crop of the study, also known as groundnut, for which genetic and cytogenetic mapping is conducted

entities.name: CYTOGENETICS
entities.description: The study of chromosomal structures and behavior in Arachis species

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: The study of heredity and variation in peanut

entities.name: ARACHIS SPECIES
entities.description: Various species within the Arachis genus used to understand chromosomal structures and genetic relationships

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism markers used for high-density genetic studies in peanut

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeats used for genetic mapping, though providing lower genome density than SNPs

entities.name: GENETIC MAPPING
entities.description: The process of determining the location of genes and quantitative trait loci on chromosomes

entities.name: REFERENCE GENOME
entities.description: A representative genome sequence, available for diploid progenitors, used for genotyping

entities.name: DIPLOID PROGENITORS
entities.description: Ancestral species of peanut with two sets of chromosomes

entities.name: TETRAPLOID GENOME
entities.description: The genome of peanut containing four sets of chromosomes, which is becoming available for mapping

entities.name: HIGH-DENSITY GENOTYPING ARRAY
entities.description: A tool containing 58 K SNPs used for conducting high-resolution mapping in peanut

entities.name: HIGH-RESOLUTION MAPPING
entities.description: A precise method of mapping genes or QTLs using high-density genotyping

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Center for Semi-Arid Tropics, the developing institution

entities.name: MAGIC POPULATIONS
entities.description: Multi-parent advanced generation intercross populations developed for high-resolution trait mapping

entities.name: NAM POPULATIONS
entities.description: Nested association mapping populations developed for high-resolution trait mapping

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the genomic regions associated with specific traits

entities.name: SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the nucleotide sequence of DNA, enabling sequence-based trait mapping

entities.name: QTL-SEQ
entities.description: A sequence-based trait mapping method used for dissecting foliar disease resistance

entities.name: FOLIAR DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: A specific trait in peanut targeted for dissection using QTL-seq

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC MARKERS
entities.description: Markers developed for deployment in breeding to create improved peanut genotypes

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved crop genotypes using diagnostic markers and genomics tools

entities.name: GENOMICS TOOLS
entities.description: Tools derived from genomic research used to facilitate breeding in peanut
